fixes.detail: Added isValidId(req.params.id) guard (400 on invalid). Added runValidators:true to findByIdAndUpdate options so role enum is enforced (bypass closed).
Added isValidId(req.params.id) guard at start (400 on invalid).
Added isValidId(req.params.id) guard at start (400 on invalid).
Param name is 'id' (route /courses/:id/enrollments). Added isValidId(req.params.id) guard at start (400 on invalid).
Replaced Promise.all of N findByIdAndUpdate with single Video.bulkWrite (updateOne $set order). Video model already required at top.
Fixed failed index bug: previously map index over filtered array gave wrong index. Now map original results with idx, filter rejected, emit original index + videoId from links[idx].
Added parseMode whitelist VALID_PARSE=['HTML','MarkdownV2','Markdown'] -> fallback 'HTML'. Added 4096-char length cap (400 if exceeded).
Added .lean() to read-only find/populate queries. getRecentPayments: find() + countDocuments() now run in parallel via Promise.all.
